aeo_readiness.summary: Valiant Air has a basic foundation for AEO but lacks depth in content, reviews, and structured data implementation.
quick_wins: Generate and manage Google reviews to improve local search presence.
Expand service pages with detailed content and targeted keywords.
Implement FAQ schema to address common customer queries.

gbp_analysis.found: The website includes NAP (Name, Address, Phone number) details, but there is no explicit GBP (Google Business Profile) optimization.
gbp_analysis.summary: The business has not fully leveraged GBP, missing opportunities for local search visibility and customer engagement.
critical_issues: Lack of customer reviews and engagement on Google.

nap_citations.summary: NAP information is consistent on the website but needs wider citation across directories and platforms.
action_items: Ensure NAP consistency across all online directories and platforms.
List the business on local citation sites like Yelp, Bing Places, and industry-specific directories.
Regularly audit and update NAP information to maintain accuracy.

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of customer reviews and engagement signals.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Users searching for HVAC services in Aurora, CO on Google.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Implementing a review generation strategy and optimizing for local search terms.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Creating high-quality, localized content that establishes Valiant Air as a trusted HVAC service provider in the area.

page_title: HVAC Services Aurora, CO | Furnace Repair & Installations
